'''âw-d-m-z''' ('''kawadmezoko''') is an [[Aelaki]] [[Verbs|transitive verb]] meaning "[[Wikt:jaw|jaw]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| w-d-m-z
|-
! Word class
| [[Transitive verb]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:jaw|jaw]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| âw-d-m-z
|-
! Lemma
| kawadmezoko
|}

== Agreement paradigm ==
=== [[Agent]] agreement ===
''[[Patient]] fixed at fourth female singular, telic perfect template.''
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:thiwadmezoko|thiwadmezoko]] || [[word:jiwadmezoko|jiwadmezoko]] || [[word:shiwadmezoko|shiwadmezoko]] || [[word:kiwadmezoko|kiwadmezoko]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:thuthuwadmezoko|thuthuwadmezoko]] || [[word:jujuwadmezoko|jujuwadmezoko]] || [[word:shushuwadmezoko|shushuwadmezoko]] || [[word:kukuwadmezoko|kukuwadmezoko]]
|-

|-

|-

|-

|-

|-

|-

|-
